technologies.name: New Relic
technologies.evidence: New Relic is a cloud observability platform that provides application performance monitoring (APM), infrastructure monitoring, log management, browser monitoring, and synthetic monitoring, all within a unified telemetry data platform.
technologies.reasoning: New Relic is mentioned as the platform being migrated from.

technologies.name: Datadog
technologies.evidence: The New Relic to Datadog Migration Platform is an innovative Application designed to facilitate the seamless migration of visualizations from New Relic to Datadog.
technologies.reasoning: Datadog is mentioned as the platform being migrated to.

technologies.name: NRQL
technologies.evidence: New Relic uses NRQL (New Relic Query Language) for data exploration.
technologies.reasoning: NRQL is mentioned as the query language used by New Relic.

technologies.name: Dynatrace
technologies.evidence: When companies look at how to keep an eye on their systems, they consider a few top choices - like New Relic, Datadog, Dynatrace, Splunk Observability Cloud, and Elastic.
technologies.reasoning: Dynatrace is mentioned as one of the top observability platforms considered alongside New Relic.

technologies.name: Splunk Observability Cloud
technologies.evidence: When companies look at how to keep an eye on their systems, they consider a few top choices - like New Relic, Datadog, Dynatrace, Splunk Observability Cloud, and Elastic.
technologies.reasoning: Splunk Observability Cloud is mentioned as one of the top observability platforms considered alongside New Relic.
